# TDS (Taein Design System)

> A lightweight (~23KB gzip), beginner-friendly, AI-ready React + TypeScript design system built with Vanilla Extract CSS (zero-runtime). Only 2 runtime dependencies.

## Installation

```bash
npm install @taein-designsystem/core
# or
pnpm add @taein-designsystem/core
```

## Setup

```tsx
// main.tsx
import '@taein-designsystem/core/styles.css';
import { ThemeProvider } from '@taein-designsystem/core';

function App() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider>
      <YourApp />
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```

## API Patterns

All components follow consistent patterns:
- `variant` — Visual style (e.g., 'primary' | 'dark' | 'light')
- `size` — Component size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg')
- `disabled` — Disabled state (boolean)
- `className` — Additional CSS class (string)
- `ref` — All components support forwardRef
- Form components require `label` prop for accessibility

## Components (30)

### Form & Input
- **TextField** — Text input with label, validation, helper text. Props: label, type, size, error, errorMessage, helperText, fullWidth
- **TextArea** — Multiline text input with auto-resize. Props: label, size, autoResize, height, error, errorMessage, helperText
- **Checkbox** — Checkbox with label, indeterminate state. Props: label, size, error, errorMessage, helperText, indeterminate
- **Switch** — Toggle switch. Props: label, size, error, errorMessage, helperText
- **Slider** — Range slider with marks and value display. Props: label, size, min, max, step, showValue, marks, trackColor
- **NumericSpinner** — Number input with increment/decrement buttons. Props: label, size, min, max, step, inputWidth

### Button & Action
- **Button** — Primary action button. Props: variant('primary'|'dark'|'danger'|'light'), buttonStyle('fill'|'weak'), size, loading, leftIcon, rightIcon, fullWidth, customColor
- **IconButton** — Icon-only button. Props: variant, buttonStyle, size, ghost, loading, aria-label (required)
- **SegmentedButtons** — Button group for single selection. Props: options[{value,label,icon?}], value, onChange, size

### Display & Data
- **Text** — Typography component. Props: variant('h1'-'h6'|'body1'-'body3'), as, color, weight, align, truncate
- **Badge** — Status/count indicator. Props: variant, size, max, dot, showZero
- **Chip** — Tag/filter chip. Props: label, variant('filled'|'outlined'), color, icon, avatar, onDelete, clickable, selected
- **Avatar** — User avatar with image, fallback, status. Props: src, alt, size, variant('circular'|'rounded'|'square'), status
- **Icon** — SVG icon component. Props: name('close'|'plus'|'minus'|'chevron-down'|'chevron-up'), size, color

### Feedback & Status
- **Loader** — Loading indicator (spinner/dots/bar). Props: type, size, color, label, fullScreen, overlay
- **LoadingSpinner** — Simple spinner/dots. Props: type, size, color
- **Skeleton** — Content placeholder. Props: variant('text'|'rect'|'circle'|'rounded'), animation('wave'|'pulse'|false), width, height
- **Snackbar** — Toast notification. Props: open, message, severity('success'|'error'|'warning'|'info'), position, autoHideDuration, action
- **Tooltip** — Hover tooltip. Props: children, content, position, delay, arrow

### Overlay
- **Modal** — Dialog modal. Props: open, onClose, size('sm'-'xl'|'full'), closeOnBackdropClick, closeOnEscape. Compound: Modal.Header, Modal.Title, Modal.Content, Modal.Footer
- **BottomSheet** — Mobile bottom drawer. Props: open, onClose, height('auto'|'sm'-'lg'|'full'), enableDrag, showHandle. Compound: BottomSheet.Header, BottomSheet.Title, BottomSheet.Content
- **SideSheet** — Side panel drawer. Props: open, onClose, width('sm'-'lg'|'full'), position('left'|'right'). Compound: SideSheet.Header, SideSheet.Title, SideSheet.Content
- **Popover** — Popover panel. Props: children(trigger), content, position, closeOnOutsideClick, arrow

### Layout
- **Card** — Content container. Props: variant('outlined'|'elevated'|'filled'|'interactive'), accentColor, onClick. Compound: Card.Image, Card.Header, Card.Title, Card.Body, Card.Footer
- **List** — Ordered list with spacing. Props: spacing, divider. Child: ListItem(label, value, layout)
- **BoardRow** — Expandable row/accordion. Props: title, variant, expanded, onChange, disabled
- **Divider** — Content separator. Props: orientation, variant('solid'|'dashed'|'dotted'), spacing, children(text)
- **Border** — Border wrapper. Props: sides, variant, width, color, rounded, padding
- **HeaderBar** — App header bar. Props: logo, title, actions, sticky, variant, elevation
- **FormField** — Form field wrapper (render props). Props: label, helperText, error, errorMessage, required, children(renderFn)

## Design Tokens

TDS uses a theme contract (`themeContract`) for consistent styling:
- **Color** — primary, text (primary/secondary/disabled), background, surface, border, semantic (success/error/warning/info)
- **Spacing** — 8pt grid system (4px to 160px)
- **Typography** — font family, sizes (xs to 4xl), weights, line heights
- **Border Radius** — none, sm, base, md, lg, xl, full
- **Shadow** — sm, base, md, lg, xl
- **Animation** — durations (fast/normal/slow), easings

## Accessibility (WCAG 2.2 AA)

- Semantic HTML elements (button, input, dialog)
- ARIA attributes (aria-label, aria-describedby, aria-invalid, aria-busy, aria-modal)
- Keyboard navigation (Tab, Enter, Space, Escape, Arrow keys)
- Focus indicators (3px outline, 3:1 contrast)
- Focus traps in overlays (Modal, BottomSheet, SideSheet)
- Color contrast 4.5:1 (text), 3:1 (UI elements)
